import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; export default function CookiePolicy() { return (
Legal Information

Cookie Policy

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}

1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us understand how you interact with our platform, remember your preferences (such as your chosen theme), and deliver a faster, personalized experience.

2. How We Use Cookies

We utilize cookies for several distinct purposes:

  • Essential: Strictly necessary for the basic operation of our site, such as securing forms and establishing sessions.
  • Preferences: Allows our site to remember information that changes the way the site behaves or looks, like your preferred theme (Dark/Light).
  • Analytics: We use anonymized analytics tools to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site.

3. Managing Your Preferences

You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject non-essential cookies. You can amend your browser settings to dictate how cookies are handled. Please be aware that if you choose to reject cookies, some elements of our website may not function properly for you.
); }

source:
import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; export default function PrivacyPolicy() { return (
Legal Information

Privacy Policy

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}

1. Introduction

At CaspiaNorth Overseas, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and physically and digitally protect your personal data when you use our website or services designed exclusively to support your global aspirations.

2. Information We Collect

To provide you with our visa processing and consulting services, we may collect the following information:

  • Personal Identification (Name, Date of Birth, Passport Information)
  • Contact Data (Email address, Phone number, Physical address)
  • Professional and Educational Background (relevant to study or work visa applications)
  • Financial Records (as mandated by immigration authorities to prove eligibility)

3. How We Use Your Information

The information you entrust to us is used strictly to facilitate your visa applications and our consulting services. We never sell your personal data. Your information is only shared with official government agencies, embassies, and authorized third-party partners directly involved in securely fulfilling your service requests.

4. Data Security

We maintain strict digital encryption standards and robust physical safeguards to protect your data. All sensitive application files and identification documents are securely purged post-approval according to international data retention regulations.
); }

import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; export default function TermsOfService() { return (
Legal Information

Terms of Service

Last updated: {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}

1. Agreement to Terms

By accessing our website and utilizing our visa consulting services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.

2. Service Scope and Limitations

CaspiaNorth Overseas provides advisory, preparation, and submission services for applications related to immigration and travel visas. It is critically important to understand:

  • We are a private consultancy and not affiliated with any government entity or embassy.
  • While we maintain an exceptionally high success rate, the final decision to approve or reject a visa rests entirely with the respective government authority or embassy. We cannot unequivocally guarantee visa issuance.
  • Fees paid to CaspiaNorth Overseas are strictly for our professional consulting services and do not invariably cover subsequent government or embassy processing fees unless explicitly stated in your individual agreement.

3. Client Obligations

As a client, you agree to provide completely accurate, true, and original documentation in a timely manner. Delays or rejections arising from the submission of falsified, inaccurate, or outdated information are solely the responsibility of the client.

4. Cancellation & Refund Policy

Refund requests are handled on a case-by-case basis corresponding to the amount of actual work fulfilled. Once an application has been formally submitted to an embassy, our consulting service is deemed rendered, and related consulting fees become non-refundable.
); }
